whyOpenThis: Start with the case-audit matrix because it is the strongest joined repo-level view of confidence, trust, fit findings, warnings, and package posture.

entries.description: Cross-case authority support counts by status and reasoning bucket.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want cross-case authority support counts before reading findings prose.

entries.description: Repo-level findings report for authority trust and support quality.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want case-level authority-support warnings rather than just support counts.

entries.description: Repo-level findings report for normalized versus unnormalized source metadata.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want source-hardening findings rather than the raw source metadata rollup.

entries.description: Cross-case rollup of sourceVerified and sourceNormalized authority metadata.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the raw cross-case source-hardening counts and unnormalized IDs.

entries.description: Cross-case fit-quality matrix showing direct, analogical, and record-support counts.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the fuller cross-case fit breakdown instead of the compact fit summary.

entries.description: Compact fit-quality summary for dashboard-style audit views.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want a compact fit rollup from the broader audit surface.

entries.description: Repo-level findings report for direct, analogical, and record-support fit posture.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want case-level fit findings from the broader audit surface.

entries.description: Compact case-first summary of fit findings severity and posture.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want a lighter fit findings view from the audit surface.

entries.description: Cross-case trust overview with primary artifact and warning counts.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the clearest cross-case trust overview before drilling into warning details.

entries.description: Warned-case summary across all lower-trust packages.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the compact warned-case rollup instead of the more detailed warning matrices.

entries.description: Label-sliced warning summaries for mixed-support and paraphrase-heavy cases.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want warning posture sliced directly by label.

entries.description: Per-case warned artifact kinds and warning-label counts across package entries.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want to see which artifact kinds are warned inside each package.

entries.description: Compact ranked warning-entry summary without per-case warned-kind lists.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the lightest case-first warning summary from the audit surface.

entries.description: Artifact-kind-first warning matrix showing which warned cases include each kind.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the warning surface grouped by artifact kind instead of by case.

entries.description: Compact ranked warning-kind summary without per-case detail rows.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the lightest kind-first warning summary.

entries.description: Compact discovery file for lightweight audit summary artifacts.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this when you want the lightweight warning-summary discovery path from within the broader audit surface.

entries.description: Joined case-level audit matrix with confidence, trust, primary artifact, and warning posture.
entries.whyOpenThis: Open this first when you want the strongest joined repo-level audit view before following narrower reports.
